kijiwe.title: Kijiwe
kijiwe.description: A community gaming chat group or channel called Kijiwe

name.description: The custom name of the Kijiwe channel

imageUrl.description: Cover picture URL of the Kijiwe channel, optionally uploaded to Supabase Storage

description.description: Optional sub-description of what this specific collective workspace talks about

createdBy.description: The visible nickname who organized this group

createdById.description: The Firebase User Auth UID of the creator

createdAt.description: String representation or timestamp of creation date

chatMessage.title: ChatMessage
chatMessage.description: A single community chat or shout message inside a specific Kijiwe

kijiweId.description: Reference identifier of the parent Kijiwe

senderId.description: Original Firebase User Auth UID of the sender or guest identifier

avatar.description: Dicebear avatar SVG reference or user account avatar

content.description: Raw character content of the text message

createdAt.description: ISO format timestamp or string representation of date and time of dispatch for chronological query ordering

/vijiwe/{kijiweId}.description: Community Vijiwe lists visible globally for gamers to chat

/vijiwe/{kijiweId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Realtime chat message log inside a specific Kijiwe
